gitlab_host.description: Target host IP for GitLab deployment. Accepted values: valid IPv4 address. Cannot be empty.

gitlab_project_name.description: Name of the GitLab project Omnia will create/manage. Accepted values: alphanumeric string starting with a letter or digit. Default: omnia-catalog

gitlab_project_visibility.description: GitLab project visibility. Accepted values: private, internal, public. Default: private

gitlab_default_branch.description: Default branch for repository and API operations. Accepted values: valid git branch name. Default: main

gitlab_https_port.description: HTTPS port exposed via GitLab NGINX. Accepted values: valid port number (1-65535). Default: 443

gitlab_ssh_port.description: SSH port for git+ssh operations. Accepted values: valid port number (1-65535). Default: 22

gitlab_min_storage_gb.description: Minimum free disk space in GB required before install. Accepted values: integer >= 20. Default: 20

gitlab_min_memory_gb.description: Minimum RAM in GB required before install. Accepted values: integer >= 1. Default: 4

gitlab_min_cpu_cores.description: Minimum CPU core count required before install. Accepted values: integer >= 1. Default: 2

gitlab_puma_workers.description: Puma web worker count. Scale with CPU count. Accepted values: integer (1-64). Default: 2

gitlab_sidekiq_concurrency.description: Sidekiq background job concurrency. Accepted values: integer (1-200). Default: 10

oim_api_verify_ssl.description: Verify SSL certificate when connecting to OIM API. Set to false for self-signed certs. Accepted values: true or false. Default: true

gitlab_cert_dir.description: Directory on target host where cert artifacts are generated/stored. Accepted values: absolute path string. Default: /root/gitlab-certs

gitlab_ssl_dir.description: Final SSL directory consumed by GitLab Omnibus. Accepted values: absolute path string. Default: /etc/gitlab/ssl

gitlab_repo_script_url.description: URL for the GitLab package repository setup script. Override only when pinning to gitlab-ee or a specific version.
